title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know
Steady as it goes while curve inverses and sentiment moderates - The past few weeks have been uncharacteristically calm for the otherwise volatile dry bulk market. Read More
Doric Weekly Market Insight
During the first trading week of June, Baltic indices mostly trended upwards, with the Capesize index leading the charge. Read More
From Commodore's Weekly Dry Bulk Reports
As we discussed in Commodore Research's June 3rd Weekly Dry Bulk Report, two more coal mine accidents occurred in China last month which in total resulted in the deaths of three workers.
